# zabbix_template_link (Resource)

Links a parent template to a child template. The child template inherits items, triggers, and graphs from the parent.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zabbix_template_group" "linux_templates" {
  name = "Linux templates"
}

resource "zabbix_template" "linux_base" {
  host               = "Linux base"
  template_group_ids = [zabbix_template_group.linux_templates.id]
}

resource "zabbix_template" "linux_extended" {
  host               = "Linux extended"
  template_group_ids = [zabbix_template_group.linux_templates.id]
}

resource "zabbix_template_link" "extended_inherits_base" {
  template_id        = zabbix_template.linux_extended.id
  linked_template_id = zabbix_template.linux_base.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `linked_template_id` (String) ID of the parent template to inherit from.
- `template_id` (String) ID of the child template that inherits from the parent.

### Optional

- `on_destroy` (String) Behaviour on destroy: `clear` (default) removes inherited items/triggers/graphs from the child; `unlink` unlinks only, leaving inherited entities in place.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier in the form `<template_id>/<linked_template_id>`.
